data.title: Top Wall Street Forecasters Revamp H.B. Fuller Expectations Ahead Of Q2 Earnings
data.description: H.B. Fuller Company (FUL) is set to announce its second-quarter earnings on June 24 after the market closes. Analysts anticipate a quarterly profit of $1.38 per share, marking an increase from $1.18 per share from the previous year. The consensus for H.B. Fuller's revenue this quarter is at $923.62 million, compared to $898.1 million last year. This year, the company raised its quarterly dividend by 4.3%. On the latest trading day, H.B. Fuller's stock climbed 1.7% to close at $64.77. For further details, readers can find more information on the Analyst Stock Ratings page at Benzinga, where they can filter information by stock ticker, company name, analyst firm, rating change, and other criteria.

data.title: 'Worst Crypto Winter I've Seen'—But Bitcoin, Ethereum Can Still Win, StarkWare Co-Founder Says
data.description: Bitcoin (BTC) and Ethereum (ETH) are experiencing a recovery after a significant industry downturn, as mentioned by StarkWare co-founder and Zcash creator Eli Ben-Sasson. Ben-Sasson described the current situation as the "worst crypto winter" he has seen since joining the industry in 2013. Both BTC and ETH have decreased by over 16% in the past month due to factors such as geopolitical uncertainty and capital shifting towards AI-focused companies. Despite the recent price improvements and mounting institutional interest, Ben-Sasson believes that the cryptocurrency sector is grappling with an existential crisis. He attributes the recent market rebound mainly to macroeconomic factors rather than industry-specific triggers. For more details, refer to the full story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: How To Earn $500 A Month From Methode Electronics Stock Ahead Of Q4 Earnings
data.description: Before Methode Electronics, Inc. (NYSE: MEI) releases its fourth-quarter report on Wednesday, June 24, potential gains from the company's dividends are catching the interest of some investors. The current annual dividend yield sits at 1.73%, with a quarterly dividend payout of 5 cents per share (equivalent to 20 cents per year). To achieve a monthly dividend income of $500 from Methode Electronics, investors should aim for a yearly target of $6,000. This entails dividing the target income by the $0.20 dividend, resulting in the need for approximately 30,000 shares or a total investment of around $347,100. For a more modest goal of a $100 monthly dividend ($1,200 annually), the calculation remains the same - requiring 6,000 shares or an investment of $69,420 to generate the desired monthly income. This information and more can be found in the full story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Is Strategy The 'Worst Ponzi Ever'? Critics Warn Saylor's STRC Play Could End Badly
data.description: Michael Saylor, of Strategy Inc. (NASDAQ: MSTR), saw his company's stock drop below $89.50 on Wednesday. Crypto analyst DonAlt criticized MSTR's preferred stock as "the worst Ponzi scheme" he has ever witnessed, noting that buyers who paid $100 are already facing a more than 10% loss. DonAlt described a concerning cycle: Saylor buys Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC), issues STRC, purchases more Bitcoin with the funds, leading to an increase in his average buy price. When the market dips, STRC loses value, prompting Saylor to sell Bitcoin below his average price to stabilize it, which in turn drives Bitcoin's price down, requiring more Bitcoin sales. As the market improves, Saylor issues more STRC at higher Bitcoin prices, continuing the cycle with a higher cost basis each time. Additionally, Peter Schiff highlighted the immediate harm caused by these actions. The day concluded with STRC closing at a certain price. For the complete story, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Acoramidis Associated with First-Ever Early and Sustained Direct Kidney-Protective Effects in ATTR-CM
data.description: The introduction of Acoramidis was linked to a quick onset of kidney protection, evidenced by a temporary decrease in eGFR due to hemodynamic effects and a 15.5% decrease in UACR by Day 28 compared to a placebo (P<0.05). Post-hoc analyses did not report any adverse kidney-related events.

data.title: Kartoon Studios Adopts Limited Duration Stockholder Rights Plan
data.description: Today in Beverly Hills, California, Kartoon Studios (NYSE American: TOON) revealed the implementation of a limited duration stockholder rights plan called the “Rights Plan”. The plan was unanimously approved by the Board of Directors and will involve a dividend distribution of one right for every outstanding share of common stock. This move is not a reaction to any particular takeover bid or acquisition proposal targeting Kartoon Studios. The record date for the dividend distribution is set for July 13, 2026.

data.title: Abaxx Exchange Reports Highest Monthly and Quarterly Trading Volume to Date, Surpassing One Million Contracts Year-to-Date
data.description: In the latest update from Abaxx Exchange, it was revealed that the trading data for June indicated a significant surge in activity, marking the highest-volume month recorded so far. The average daily open interest experienced a substantial boost, rising by an impressive 200% compared to the previous month, May. This data showcases a noteworthy increase in market participation and trading activity on the exchange during this period.

data.title: Dollar Tree, Inc. Announces $2.5 Billion Share Repurchase Authorization
data.description: In Chesapeake, Virginia, Dollar Tree, Inc. (NASDAQ: DLTR) revealed today that its Board of Directors has renewed the Company’s share repurchase authorization, now totaling $2.5 billion. This aligns with the limit previously set by the Board in July 2025. The fresh authorization encompasses any remaining funds from the Company’s previous program. As part of this initiative, the Company recently bought back $500 million of its common stock in June.

data.title: Polyrizon Announces Successful Results for NASARIX™ Biocompatibility Program, Supporting Advancement Towards First in Human Clinical Trial
data.description: On July 2, 2026, in Raanana, Israel, Polyrizon Ltd. (Nasdaq: PLRZ) revealed positive outcomes from its biocompatibility assessment of NASARIX TM Allergy Blocker nasal spray. The company, focused on intranasal hydrogels, conducted successful biological safety tests meeting specified criteria, indicating progress in the development of its innovative product.

data.title: Cleverbridge Among the First to Enable Visa’s Trusted Agent Protocol and Agentic Directory, Providing Secure Access to Approved Agents
data.description: A partnership between Cleverbridge and Visa is set to facilitate and trial agentic commerce, aiding software and SaaS firms in gearing up for safe AI-triggered transactions. The collaboration aims to bolster secure payment processing mechanisms for companies, especially those dealing in digital products and services. This initiative aligns with the ever-evolving technology landscape and the growing emphasis on secure and efficient transaction processing methods.

data.title: APi Group Completes the Acquisition of WTech Fire Group and Updates 2026 Guidance
data.description: On July 1, 2026, APi Group Corporation (NYSE: APG) completed the acquisition of WTech Fire Group, a major supplier of fire sprinkler, suppression, and detection services in Europe. The deal, first revealed on April 17, 2026, enhances APi's global operations by incorporating WTech's strong fire sprinkler and suppression expertise. WTech is anticipated to bring in about $175 million in revenue to APi.

data.title: Yield-bearing stablecoin market drops 15% in Q2, ending 3-year growth streak, while Treasury-backed cryptos like BUIDL, USYC, and USDY rise.
data.description: The supply of stablecoins that generate yields decreased by 15% in the second quarter. This drop was mainly due to the contraction of sUSDe and sUSDS. However, Treasury-backed products like BUIDL, USYC, and USDY saw a continued increase during this period.
